## 📚 OpenAlex

本表数据来自 OpenAlex 论文检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)`，时间窗口 2026-02-12 ~ 2026-02-18。检索结果共9条，涵盖6G网络、AI技术、机器人等主题。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 9 | Learning Transferability: A Two-Stage Reinforcement Learning Approach for Enhancing Quadruped Robots' Performance in U-Shaped Stair Climbing | 提出两阶段强化学习方法提升四足机器人U型楼梯攀爬性能 | https://openalex.org/W7130237401 | 强化学习, 四足机器人, 运动控制, 迁移学习 | 2026-02-16 | arXiv (Cornell University) | 0 |
| 8 | ISAC Meets LLMs: Advancing from Sensing to Reasoning with Foundation Models and Flexible Intelligent Metasurfaces | 探讨6G系统中LLM与智能超表面的结合，实现从感知到推理的跨越 | https://doi.org/10.22541/au.177145191.12506749/v1 | 6G, LLM, 智能超表面, 感知通信 | 2026-02-18 | - | 0 |
| 7 | Computational Architectures for 6G Networks: Integrating Distributed Computing and Edge Artificial Intelligence | 综述6G网络中分布式计算与边缘AI的融合架构 | https://doi.org/10.20944/preprints202602.1019.v1 | 6G, 边缘计算, 分布式系统, 网络架构 | 2026-02-12 | Preprints.org | 0 |
| 7 | Artificial intelligence for next-generation 6G technologies and networks | 全面综述AI在6G网络中的应用与技术 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s44354-026-00016-3 | 6G, 人工智能, 网络技术, 综述 | 2026-02-14 | Discover Networks | 0 |
| 6 | Dynamic task offloading in vehicular networks using large language models for adaptive low latency decision making | 提出基于LLM的动态任务卸载方案，优化车载网络延迟 | https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-026-39791-y | LLM, 车载网络, 任务卸载, 边缘计算 | 2026-02-15 | Scientific Reports | 0 |
| 6 | A Comprehensive Survey of Blockchain Applications in Communication Networks | 综述区块链在通信网络中的应用 | https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-8622215/v1 | 区块链, 通信网络, 综述 | 2026-02-18 | Research Square | 0 |
| 5 | Advances in Robotics and Autonomous Systems: Transitioning from Automation to Intelligent Collaboration | 探讨机器人系统从自动化向智能协作的演进 | https://doi.org/10.3390/app16041966 | 机器人, 自动化, 智能系统 | 2026-02-16 | Applied Sciences | 0 |
| 4 | Deep learning for crowd counting in complex environments: challenges and novel trends | 综述复杂环境下深度学习人群计数的挑战与趋势 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s10791-026-09928-8 | 深度学习, 人群计数, 计算机视觉 | 2026-02-17 | Discover Computing | 0 |
| 3 | Local environmental and spatial processes, not land use, shape the taxonomic and functional structure of pond zooplankton communities | 研究池塘浮游动物群落的环境与空间驱动因素 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s00027-026-01275-6 | 生态学, 空间分析, 群落结构 | 2026-02-16 | Aquatic Sciences | 0 |

sections.heading: 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索
